title: ai-squad Dispatch Manifest
description: Canonical contract for dispatch-manifest.json written by the SDD orchestrator per Feature Session. schema_version 1: original fields (FEAT-001/002/003). schema_version 2 (additive): adds optional top-level pm_sessions[] and optional actual_dispatches[].tier_calibration. All v2 additions are optional; v1 manifests validate cleanly under this schema. Parsers must treat missing v2 fields as empty/null (tolerant parsing). Backward-compatible per NFR-002.
$comment: additionalProperties:false at root — all valid top-level keys are enumerated in properties (schema_version, task_id, plan_generated_at, expected_pipeline, actual_dispatches, pm_sessions). Validated clean against FEAT-001/002/003/004 fixtures. NFR-002 backward-compatibility is satisfied by optional properties (pm_sessions, tier_calibration) not by tolerating unknown root keys.

schema_version.description: Schema version. 1 = original (FEAT-001/002/003). 2 = additive bump adding pm_sessions[] and tier_calibration.

plan_generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the orchestrator initialized this manifest

expected_pipeline.description: Ordered list of tasks and their required pipeline roles as declared by tasks.md

task_id.description: Sub-task identifier, e.g. T-001 or AUDIT

required_roles.description: Ordered list of roles expected for this task

acScope.$comment: Intentional camelCase: field name is acScope (not ac_scope) in all real manifests on disk (FEAT-003, FEAT-004 expected_pipeline). Historical naming predates the snake_case convention. v3 schema may rename to ac_scope after a migration script. Do NOT silently rename here without migrating all dispatch-manifest.json fixtures.
acScope.description: Optional: AC IDs in scope for this pipeline entry

tasksCovered.$comment: Intentional camelCase: field name is tasksCovered (not tasks_covered) in all real manifests on disk (FEAT-003, FEAT-004 expected_pipeline). Same historical naming reason as acScope. v3 schema may rename to tasks_covered after a migration script.
tasksCovered.description: Optional: task IDs this entry covers

actual_dispatches.description: Append-only log of every Subagent dispatch executed in this session

items.$comment: additionalProperties:true intentional: FEAT-002 fixtures contain 'review_loop' field not defined in schema properties; tightening to false would break backward-compatibility (NFR-002). Tolerate unknown dispatch fields; parsers ignore unrecognized keys.

task_id.description: Sub-task or feature task this dispatch served

role.description: Subagent role that executed this dispatch. Enum derived from output-packet.schema.json role enum (SDD Phase 4 roles only; pm-orchestrator is a Skill, not a Subagent, so not listed here). 'committer' added FEAT-006: auto-commit Subagent dispatched post-Phase-4 handoff.

output_packet_ref.description: Relative path to the Output Packet JSON file

status.description: Terminal status of this dispatch. 'needs_changes' is a reviewer-specific status used in FEAT-003 fixtures (code-reviewer/logic-reviewer return needs_changes when dev must revise). 'pending'/'running' are in-flight states written by orchestrator before dispatch completes. All values cross-referenced with output-packet.schema.json status enum plus orchestrator lifecycle states. NOTE: 'partial' is deprecated (FEAT-006) — no orchestrator producer emits it; accepted with deprecation warning for backward-compat with historical manifests.

anyOf.description: DEPRECATED (FEAT-006): no orchestrator producer emits this value. Accepted for backward-compat with historical manifests only. Will be removed in vNext+1.

loop.description: Optional: loop counter for dev/review/qa cycles

pm_note.description: Optional: PM annotation for this dispatch

usage.description: Optional: per-dispatch token usage captured by capture-subagent-usage.py Stop hook

tier_calibration.description: Optional (v2): Tier x Loop calibration for this dispatch; absent on v1 manifests. When present, used by agentops cost-by-tier rollup (AC-016).

tier.description: Task complexity tier from tasks.md Tier: field

model.description: Model identifier used for this dispatch, e.g. claude-sonnet-4-6

effort.description: Effort level for this dispatch per canonical Tier x Loop table (shared/concepts/effort.md)

loop_kind.description: Loop kind identifier, e.g. dev L1 | dev L2 | dev L3 | qa-L1 | qa-L2 | reviewer

pm_sessions.description: Optional (v2): PM session cost observability entries. Absent on v1 manifests. Populated by capture-pm-usage.py Stop hook when /pm Skill completes (AC-013). agentops report aggregates these under '## Cost by PM session' (AC-015).

session_id.description: Unique identifier for this PM session, e.g. pm-FEAT-004-20260511T053800Z

started_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the PM session started

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the PM session completed (Stop event)

input_tokens.description: Total input tokens consumed in this PM session

output_tokens.description: Total output tokens produced in this PM session

cost_usd.description: Monetary cost in USD for this PM session

source.description: Provenance of usage data. platform_captured = from Claude Code session telemetry (preferred). self_reported = written by PM Skill at handoff from pm_handoff.json (fallback).
